name: Loanmax Title Loans
description_short: LoanMax provides auto title loans up to $10,000 with same-day funding at multiple Las Vegas locations. Requires only vehicle, photo ID, and clear title.
description_long:
LoanMax Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a vehicle equity lender. The company has expanded to multiple states and maintains several locations throughout Las Vegas and Nevada, serving customers who need quick access to cash against their vehicle's equity.

LoanMax specializes exclusively in auto title loans, allowing borrowers to leverage their vehicle's value for loans up to $10,000. The application process requires minimal documentation: a vehicle, government-issued photo ID, and a clear vehicle title. The company accepts multiple payment methods including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union. Loan approval and amounts are contingent on vehicle evaluation and ability to repay.

LoanMax operates multiple locations across Las Vegas with consistent hours (Mon-Fri 10am-6pm, Sat 9am-2pm) and a toll-free application line (877-511-CASH). The company is licensed and regulated in multiple states including Nevada, Virginia (through Fairfax Elite Financial Services), Delaware, South Carolina, New Mexico, and Michigan. Nevada customers are explicitly warned that title loans should be used for short-term needs only, not long-term financial solutions.

Title loans carry significant risks, including high interest rates and potential vehicle loss if payments are missed. Nevada regulators recommend credit counseling before entering a title loan agreement. While LoanMax provides fast emergency funding for those with limited credit options, the collateral-based nature and short-term structure make these loans expensive compared to traditional personal loans or payday alternatives.
pros: Fast funding with loans up to $10,000 available same-day or next-day
Minimal requirements: only vehicle, photo ID, and clear title needed
Multiple payment methods accepted: cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Multiple Las Vegas locations (5 within Las Vegas metro, 1 in Henderson) with consistent hours
Licensed and regulated in 6+ states with published regulatory compliance information
Established company with 25+ years of operating history
Clear disclosure that title loans are short-term solutions with risk warnings for Nevada customers
cons: Title loans typically carry very high interest rates not disclosed on website
Risk of vehicle repossession if loan payments are missed or defaulted
Limited to borrowers with vehicle equity and clear title ownership
Regulatory warning in Nevada that these should not be used as long-term financial solution
No online application or funding option mentioned; requires in-person visit to store
best_for: Borrowers with poor credit who need emergency cash quickly and have vehicle equity
People facing immediate short-term cash needs who can repay within weeks/months
Vehicle owners who have been denied traditional personal loans or lines of credit
Consumers seeking an alternative to payday loans with collateral-backed security
diagnosis: LoanMax is best for borrowers facing immediate cash emergencies who own vehicles with equity and have limited access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that title loans are expensive short-term solutions with high interest rates and vehicle repossession risk if payments are missed; they should only be considered when other options are unavailable and repayment within weeks is certain.
services: In-person loan applications at physical locations
Loan approval based on vehicle evaluation
Online payment portal for existing customers
Multi-location accessibility across Las Vegas metro and Henderson
